review_text: One of the greatest FPS games ever made. The story, physics, and level design are still amazing.
Very competitive and intense gameplay. Great with friends but the matchmaking can be frustrating.
Relaxing farming simulator with tons of content. Easy to lose hundreds of hours in this game.

Massive open world RPG with great storytelling and memorable characters.
